reference: Hello, well the fact that she took the emergency contraceptive pill after having sex was a good idea, as it greatly reduces the chances of getting pregnant during unprotected sex or in the event of the breakage of a condom. Now, you must understand this: even though your girlfriend's period is generally regular, there are times when it can be irregular for everyone, which means she can have her period later or earlier than normal. The fact that the home pregnancy test has given a negative result three times in a row is a good sign and, in all likelihood, means that she is not pregnant. However, if you are still having doubts about the results, you can go to a doctor and ask them to perform a blood test on your girlfriend; it is by far one of the most efficient and accurate tests available, but it takes time, as you need to make an appointment and see a doctor. I hope this answers your question.
text: However, just a few years before, a war that killed around a million people was taking place between Iran and Iraq, and it's usually referred to as the Iran-Iraq War. The conflict was due to the fact that after the Iranian Revolution, Saddam Hussein, president of Iraq, saw an opportunity to expand his power and territory. You see, the Middle East is unstable and complicated, but it's fine as long as you're not there. You just have to not try to understand it. In any case, the Iran-Iraq War was one of the deadliest conflicts in the second half of the 20th century. One particularly fascinating aspect is that during the war, both countries would shoot at each other. But at the same time, there was constant trade and exchange between them. Iran would sell Iraqi oil and buy weapons, while at the same time, Iraq would buy Iranian oil and sell weapons. Both countries were doing strategic and practical business together all the time, while at the same time, they were shooting at each other.
